price: Hierauf gießt über seinen Kopf von der Strafe des heißen Wassers.
arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّواْ فَوۡقَ رَأۡسِهِۦ مِنۡ عَذَابِ ٱلۡحَمِيمِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: thumma ṣubbū fawqa rasihi min ʿadhābi al-ḥamīmi
